articles.title: IIT-I develops app to map climate risks in key biodiversity areas
articles.description: Indore: Indian Institute of Technology, Indore (IIT-I), developed a climate monitoring application to map extreme rain and drought risks across India'.
articles.content: Indore: Indian Institute of Technology, Indore (IIT-I), developed a climate monitoring application to map extreme rain and drought risks across India's key biodiversity areas (KBAs). The application can help policymakers and conservation agencies bet... [1937 chars]

articles.title: New Saatva store at Legacy Village brings with it concept of luxury sleep via its premium mattresses
articles.description: Legacy Village in Lyndhurst has welcomed a new store, Saatva, to its Home District. Saatva premium mattresses can be viewed in a special Viewing Room in which technology allows customers to experience "high-touch" service in an immersive space.
articles.content:
LYNDHURST, Ohio -- Shoppers at Legacy Village are being introduced to the concept of luxury sleep with the opening of premium mattress store Saatva.
The first company to sell luxury mattresses online, Saatva has opened its first Ohio retail store in ... [2929 chars]

articles.title: Legislative proposal aims to lower injuries, deaths from police pursuits
articles.description: Millions of federal dollars would be unlocked by the legislation, allowing police departments to invest in new technology to safely stop car chases.
articles.content:
New legislation proposed by a California lawmaker would enable police departments to harness tens millions in dollars in federal funding to stop police chases from turning dangerous or deadly.

articles.title: Beyond the grid: Why GE Vernova is betting on human connection to power the future
articles.description: Technology may be reshaping the workplace, but according to GE Vernova’s Reginald Miller, culture still hinges on a timeless question: are employees being heard?
articles.content: “With all of that complexity, we need to make sure that we develop people around their leadership capabilities…but also make sure that they can show up and be the best versions of themselves.” – Reginald Miller, Vice-President and Chief Culture and I... [9182 chars]
